name: eval-fixture-npm-alias-malicious
description: Fixture: a package.json that hides the historically-malicious event-stream@3.3.6 behind an npm: alias (a innocuous-looking dependency name pointing at npm:event-stream@3.3.6). The manifest parser must resolve the alias to its real registry target so the malicious-package check still fires; a clean lodash range and a normal react are present as expected_clean.
